description_long: This object is a stack of two square, golden-brown pancakes with a slightly crisp, griddled surface, each featuring a grid-like pattern of shallow indentations. The pancakes are thick and fluffy, with a soft, bread-like texture visible along the sides. The top pancake displays a uniform, toasted coloration with subtle variations in browning, suggesting it was cooked evenly on a hot griddle. The stack sits neatly on a flat, white, square plate that contrasts with the warm tones of the pancakes. There are no visible toppings, syrups, or garnishes present on or around the pancakes. The overall appearance is appetizing and simple, suitable for a breakfast or brunch setting in an urban environment.
description: A stack of two thick, square, golden-brown pancakes with a griddled surface, served on a white square plate. No toppings, syrup, or garnish are present.
description_view_0: Front view of the pancake stack showing the grid pattern and fluffy sides, with the white plate clearly visible underneath.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the even browning and thickness of both pancakes, with the plate edges more pronounced.
description_view_2: Direct side view emphasizing the uniform height and soft texture of the pancakes, with the plate's flatness evident.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing similar features as the front, with the grid pattern and plate edges visible.
